        • impl

          LocalCBclient impl
          this local CBclient object is used to establish a direct connection to a CB server.

    • Class i5.cb.api.RemoteCBclientFactory extends java.rmi.server.UnicastRemoteObject implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • vConnections

          java.util.Vector<E extends java.lang.Object> vConnections
          stores the connection objects so they are not garbage collected.

  • Package i5.cb.api.notification

    • Class i5.cb.api.notification.Notification extends com.objectspace.jgl.SList implements Serializable

    • Class i5.cb.api.notification.ParseException extends java.lang.Exception implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • currentToken

          Token currentToken
          This is the last token that has been consumed successfully. If this object has been created due to a parse error, the token followng this token will (therefore) be the first error token.

        • eol

          java.lang.String eol
          The end of line string for this machine.

        • expectedTokenSequences

          int[][] expectedTokenSequences
          Each entry in this array is an array of integers. Each array of integers represents a sequence of tokens (by their ordinal values) that is expected at this point of the parse.

        • specialConstructor

          boolean specialConstructor
          This variable determines which constructor was used to create this object and thereby affects the semantics of the "getMessage" method (see below).

        • tokenImage

          java.lang.String[] tokenImage
          This is a reference to the "tokenImage" array of the generated parser within which the parse error occurred. This array is defined in the generated ...Constants interface.

    • Class i5.cb.api.notification.TokenMgrError extends java.lang.Error implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • errorCode

          int errorCode
          Indicates the reason why the exception is thrown. It will have one of the above 4 values.

  • Package i5.cb.graph

    • Class i5.cb.graph.DiagramDesktop extends javax.swing.JDesktopPane implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • backgroundImage

          java.awt.image.BufferedImage backgroundImage
          Background image for DiagramDesktop

        • bUseSmoothLines

          boolean bUseSmoothLines

        • cHostOrig

          java.lang.String cHostOrig
          holds the CBserver host name originally loaded from a GEL file

        • ddMouseListener

          DiagramDesktop.DDMouseListener ddMouseListener
          The MouseListener for all mouse manipulations on the desktop.

        • graphInternalFrame

          GraphInternalFrame graphInternalFrame
          the frame, this DiagramDesktop is associated to.

        • m_bMovableDNonEdge

          boolean m_bMovableDNonEdge
          flag for controlling the co-moving of diagram nodes that sit on edges

        • m_cInvalidNodes

          java.util.Collection<E extends java.lang.Object> m_cInvalidNodes
          The nodes that are somehow invalid

        • m_cSelectedNodes

          java.util.Collection<E extends java.lang.Object> m_cSelectedNodes
          The nodes which are currently marked by the user

        • m_gLayout

          DiagramDesktopGLayouter m_gLayout
          layouter using grappa

        • m_isEdited

          boolean m_isEdited
          flag indicating whether anything in the diagram desktop has been changed, e.g. location of a node

        • m_ScreenshotTaken

          boolean m_ScreenshotTaken
          flag indicating whether we are currently saving a screenshop

        • m_sInvalidNodesMethod

          java.lang.String m_sInvalidNodesMethod

        • propertyChangeSupport

          java.beans.PropertyChangeSupport propertyChangeSupport
          Utility field used by bound properties.

        • zoomer

          i5.cb.graph.zooming.CBZoomer zoomer
          CBZoomer for DiagramDesktop

          int dragStartX

        • dragStartY

        • selectionRect

    • Class i5.cb.graph.GraphEditor extends javax.swing.JFrame implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • bSizeSet

          boolean bSizeSet

        • currentLayoutDir

          java.io.File currentLayoutDir

        • m_graphInternalFrameListener

          i5.cb.graph.GraphInternalFrameListener m_graphInternalFrameListener

        • m_graphMenuBar

          GraphMenuBar m_graphMenuBar
          The editor's MenuBar. Usually contains file, edit, language,...etc menus.

        • m_graphStatusBar

          javax.swing.JToolBar m_graphStatusBar

        • m_graphToolBar

          javax.swing.JToolBar m_graphToolBar
          The editor's ToolBar. Usually contains save, open, new...etc buttons.

        • m_infoPane

          javax.swing.JTextPane m_infoPane
          Here the information about a single node is displayed

        • m_mainDesktopPane

          javax.swing.JDesktopPane m_mainDesktopPane
          This is where we add all the GraphInternalFrames and maybe the infowindow

        • m_statusConnectionLabel

          javax.swing.JLabel m_statusConnectionLabel

        • m_statusProgressBar

          javax.swing.JProgressBar m_statusProgressBar
          A progressbar that is placed in the m_graphStatusBar. It's passed to the gifworker of the currently active GraphInternal Frame so the m_gifWorker can issue information concerning its progress

        • m_toolBarButtons

          java.util.Hashtable<K extends java.lang.Object,V extends java.lang.Object> m_toolBarButtons

        • m_vGraphInternalFrames

          java.util.Vector<E extends java.lang.Object> m_vGraphInternalFrames
          The GraphInternalFrames currently placed inside this GraphEditor window

        • s_cbgraphParams

          java.lang.String[] s_cbgraphParams
          The current command line arguments by which CBGraph was started or that are imported from the GEL file

    • Class i5.cb.graph.GraphEditor.GEFileFilter extends javax.swing.filechooser.FileFilter implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • m_Extensions

          java.util.ArrayList<E extends java.lang.Object> m_Extensions

        • m_sDescription

        • m_sExtension

    • Class i5.cb.graph.GraphInternalFrame extends javax.swing.JInternalFrame implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • gelFilename

          java.lang.String gelFilename

        • m_diagramClass

          DiagramClass m_diagramClass
          The DiagramClass contains information about all components that are shown on this frame's DiagramDesktop.

        • m_diagramDesktop

          DiagramDesktop m_diagramDesktop
          Every GraphInternalFrame contains one single DiagramDesktop.

        • m_gifWorker

          IFrameWorker m_gifWorker
          This may be a thread running in background that is capable of providing info about its progress in the mainwindows progressbar

        • m_graphEditor

          GraphEditor m_graphEditor
          The GraphEditor that opened this frame.

        • m_sStatus

          java.lang.String m_sStatus
          Holds value of property m_sStatus.

        • propertyChangeSupport

          java.beans.PropertyChangeSupport propertyChangeSupport
          Utility field used by bound properties.

          the DiagramNode associated with this instance of GraphPopup

          GraphMenuItem m_eraseItem
          the Item to erase this DiagramObject

  • Package i5.cb.graph.diagram

    • Class i5.cb.graph.diagram.DiagramClass extends java.lang.Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • graphInternalFrame

          GraphInternalFrame graphInternalFrame
          Holds value of property graphInternalFrame.

        • htDiagramClass

          java.util.Hashtable<K extends java.lang.Object,V extends java.lang.Object> htDiagramClass
          This hashtable stores DiagramClassHashtable entries. The keys are user objects.

        • multiPopup

          GraphPopup multiPopup
          This popupMenu is invoked by a set of DiagramObjects.

    • Class i5.cb.graph.diagram.DiagramGlassPane extends javax.swing.JComponent implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • diagNodeML

          DiagramNodeMouseListener diagNodeML

        • parentDiagramNode

          DiagramNode parentDiagramNode
          The DiagramNode that this glasspane is associated with.

        • rBounds

          java.awt.Rectangle rBounds
          The bounds of this glasspane.
          See Also:
          DiagramGlassPane.rInnerBounds

        • rInnerBounds

          java.awt.Rectangle rInnerBounds
          The inner bounds of this glasspane. together with DiagramGlassPane.rBounds one can define a frame in which the mousepointer is not regarded as beeing over the glasspane, which means that the user can access some components of the node wich were else covered by the glasspane

    • Class i5.cb.graph.diagram.DiagramLabel extends javax.swing.JLabel implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • m_defaultminsize

          java.awt.Dimension m_defaultminsize

        • oldSize

          java.awt.Dimension oldSize
          Describe variable oldSize here.

    • Class i5.cb.graph.diagram.DiagramNode extends javax.swing.JInternalFrame implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • bComponentVisible

          boolean bComponentVisible
          True if the component is visible.

        • bHasSquareDot

          boolean bHasSquareDot
          True if the small component is represented by a small square dot, which is used to display the diagram node on edges that have empty labels

        • bSmallComponentVisible

          boolean bSmallComponentVisible
          True if the small component (and shape) is visible. Should be equal to !bComponentVisible

        • m_bHasFixedPosition

          boolean m_bHasFixedPosition
          True, if the objec can not be dragged around on the desktop, e.g. edges, nodes that are placed on edges.

        • m_bundle

          java.util.ResourceBundle m_bundle

        • m_bValid

          boolean m_bValid
          False if this node shall be marked as invalid on the DiagramDesktop

        • m_dComponentSize

          java.awt.Dimension m_dComponentSize

        • m_designatedLocation

          java.awt.Point m_designatedLocation
          designated location of this node

        • m_diagramClass

          DiagramClass m_diagramClass
          The DiagramClass that manages the associated items such as JPopupMenu or the infodocument for every userobject

        • m_diagramDesktop

          DiagramDesktop m_diagramDesktop

        • m_diagramEdge

          DiagramEdge m_diagramEdge
          This is the edge, if this Node is on an edge.

        • m_Dot

          java.awt.Dimension m_Dot
          Size of a small square dot

        • m_dSmallComponentSize

          java.awt.Dimension m_dSmallComponentSize

        • m_iPaintShapePolicy

          int m_iPaintShapePolicy

        • m_isDragged

          boolean m_isDragged
          True is this diagram node is currently being dragged

        • m_isFrozen

          boolean m_isFrozen
          True is this diagram node is frozen to its current position

        • m_nodeLevel

          int m_nodeLevel
          Node level relative to the JLayeredPane level

        • m_userObject

          java.lang.Object m_userObject
          The userobject that is to be represented on the DiagramDesktop by this DiagramNode

        • m_vEdges

          java.util.Vector<E extends java.lang.Object> m_vEdges
          A vector of edges that are linked to this object.

        • propertyChangeSupport

          java.beans.PropertyChangeSupport propertyChangeSupport
          Utility field used by bound properties.

    • Class i5.cb.telos.frame.ParseException extends java.lang.Exception implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • currentToken

          Token currentToken
          This is the last token that has been consumed successfully. If this object has been created due to a parse error, the token followng this token will (therefore) be the first error token.

        • eol

          java.lang.String eol
          The end of line string for this machine.

        • expectedTokenSequences

          int[][] expectedTokenSequences
          Each entry in this array is an array of integers. Each array of integers represents a sequence of tokens (by their ordinal values) that is expected at this point of the parse.

        • specialConstructor

          boolean specialConstructor
          This variable determines which constructor was used to create this object and thereby affects the semantics of the "getMessage" method (see below).

        • tokenImage

          java.lang.String[] tokenImage
          This is a reference to the "tokenImage" array of the generated parser within which the parse error occurred. This array is defined in the generated ...Constants interface.

  • Package i5.cb.telos.object

    • Class i5.cb.telos.object.Attribute extends TelosLink implements Serializable

      • Serialization Methods

        • readResolve

          public java.lang.Object readResolve​()
                             throws java.io.ObjectStreamException
          Required for correct Serialization (@see i5.cb.telos.object.Individual.readResolve)
          Throws:
          java.io.ObjectStreamException

      • Serialized Fields

        • sLabel

          java.lang.String sLabel
          this attribute's label

    • Class i5.cb.telos.object.Individual extends TelosObject implements Serializable

      • Serialization Methods

        • readResolve

          public java.lang.Object readResolve​()
                             throws java.io.ObjectStreamException
          Required for correct Serialization: All TelosObjects are stored in a static hashtable (@see i5.cb.telos.object.TelosObject). The normal serialization method creates the TelosObject without checking if it already exists in the hashtable. Therefore, we sometimes have different "Java Objects" that represent the same "TelosObject". Overwriting the readResolve() method solves this problem. It is called by the readObject-method of ObjectInputStream. The "this" object is in this case the object which has just been read from the ObjectInputStream.
          Throws:
          java.io.ObjectStreamException

      • Serialized Fields

        • sLabel

          java.lang.String sLabel
          this object's label

    • Class i5.cb.telos.object.Instantiation extends TelosLink implements Serializable

      • Serialization Methods

        • readResolve

          public java.lang.Object readResolve​()
                             throws java.io.ObjectStreamException
          Required for correct Serialization (@see i5.cb.telos.object.Individual.readResolve)
          Throws:
          java.io.ObjectStreamException

                             throws java.io.ObjectStreamException
